message:
feat(core): Add policy simulation input/output types

Introduce types for running policy simulations without side effects,
enabling CLI tools and tests to evaluate policy outcomes:

PolicySimulationInput:
- zone_policy: ZonePolicyObject to evaluate against
- invoke_request: InvokeRequest under evaluation
- transport: TransportMode (defaults to Mesh)
- checkpoint_fresh/revocation_fresh: Freshness flags
- execution_approval_required: Whether approvals are needed
- sanitizer_receipts: Optional receipts to apply
- related_object_ids: Related objects for flow checks
- request_object_id/request_input_hash: Optional overrides
- safety_tier: Operation safety tier
- principal/capability_id: Optional credential overrides
- provenance_record: Optional explicit provenance
- now_ms: Evaluation time override

Supporting types:
- TransportMode enum (Local, Mesh, CrossZone, CrossTailnet)
- Default implementations for simulation parameters
- Serde serialization for JSON/CBOR interchange

This enables the fcp policy CLI to perform preflight checks against
policy without requiring a live network or executing operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
